projects.title: Telegram Automation Bot
projects.desc: A multi-feature Telegram bot built with Python that automates notifications, manages task queues, and integrates external APIs for real-time data delivery.

projects.title: Discord Notification System
projects.desc: A Discord bot for server automation — automated announcements, role management, scheduled tasks, and webhook integrations using Python discord.py.

projects.title: Industrial Dashboard Monitor
projects.desc: A web-based monitoring dashboard for industrial automation data — real-time system health, alerts, control panel status, and data visualization.

projects.title: Cloud Automation Pipeline
projects.desc: An automated cloud deployment and task scheduling pipeline using Python scripts and cloud computing fundamentals for reliable background execution.

projects.title: PLC Logic Visualizer
projects.desc: A software interface for visualizing and testing PLC ladder logic sequences — developed during the Losung Automation internship.

projects.title: API Integration Toolkit
projects.desc: A reusable Python toolkit for rapid API integration — handles auth flows, rate limiting, response parsing, retry logic, and error handling.
